message:
fix(indexer): populate IndexingStats in batch and rebuild code paths

The --full --force-rebuild JSON output showed scan_ms: 0,
total_conversations: 0, total_messages: 0 because IndexingStats was
never populated in run_batch_index() or any of the three
rebuild_tantivy_from_db() call sites.

Changes:
- run_batch_index: track scan_ms/index_ms timing, count conversations
  and messages per connector, populate stats before returning
- All three rebuild_tantivy_from_db call sites: capture rebuild_docs
  return value and write conversation/message counts to stats
- Discovered agent names now collected outside the progress guard so
  they can be reused for both progress tracking and stats

Addresses #148

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
